title: A Wild Last Boss Appears!
overview: After finishing the greatest battle in Exgate Online history, the player gets incarnated as his character.

title: We Came to Svel!
overview: Lufas journeys to Svel and learns about what happened to the world in her 200 year absence.

title: Aries Has Attacked!
overview: Aries attacks Svel, fighting Megrez and Levia.

title: They Were Pulling Strings Behind the Scenes!
overview: After beating sense into Aries, Lufas punishes the devilfolk that manipulated him and catches up with Megrez.

title: A Wild Hot Spring Appeared!
overview: Lufas creates an RV golem and enjoys a hot spring with Dina. Then they brave Lufas' grave.

title: Libra of the Scales Appeared!
overview: Lufas recovers Libra, leaving Jean's party believing they conquered the Grave of the Black-Winged King.

title: I was... a Savior!
overview: Lufas takes a pit-stop at the new home of her people and memories resurface. Libra & Aries each uncover a foe.

title: Hey! 5%?! Seriously?!
overview: Tensions in Gjallarhorn are verging on civil war as Lufas debates what to do. Libra grows suspicious of Dina.

title: The Masses Have Rioted!
overview: Libra captures Jupiter, Lufas stops Aigokeros, and Dina calms the populace. Afterward, Merak get a pep-talk.

title: Who Are You?
overview: The truth about Dina comes to light and she comes to blows with Lufas. Is she really telling the truth though?

title: A Wild Lufas Maphaal And a Wild Devil King Have Appeared at the Same Time!!!
overview: The true Hero is summoned to defeat the Devil King! Yet his journey starts with encountering both Last Bosses!

title: There Was Something Incredible in My Homeland!
overview: At her homeland Lufas uncovers the reason for Parthenos' actions and hints to the real Lufas' true goals.
